chunks.text: Message 0x181 (MotorStatus): 2 signals. MotorRPM (bit 0, 16 bits, 0.125rpm) MotorTemp (bit 16, 8 bits, 1.0degC)
Message 0x182 (HVStatus): 3 signals. BatteryVoltage (bit 0, 16 bits, 0.1V) MotorCurrent (bit 16, 16 bits, 0.1A) CoolantTemp (bit 32, 8 bits, 1.0degC)

Message 0x201 (VcuCommand): 5 signals. TorqueDemand (bit 0, 16 bits, 0.1Nm) EnableRequest (bit 16, 1 bits, 1.0) PumpControl (bit 24, 1 bits, 1.0) FanControl (bit 25, 1 bits, 1.0) DiagService (bit 56, 8 bits, 1.0)

Message 0x202 (BatteryInfo): 4 signals. StateOfCharge (bit 0, 8 bits, 0.5%) CellVoltageMin (bit 8, 16 bits, 0.001V) CellVoltageMax (bit 24, 16 bits, 0.001V) IsolationResistance (bit 40, 16 bits, 1.0kOhm)
Message 0x203 (ThermalStatus): 3 signals. RadiatorTemp (bit 0, 8 bits, 1.0degC) PumpSpeed (bit 8, 16 bits, 0.1rpm) FanSpeed (bit 24, 8 bits, 1.0%)
